case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEXINGTON NATIONAL INSURANCE $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
